brand.name: Nora Michalski
brand.vertical: B2B/professional services — psychology-based performance protocol for high-achievers

offer.what: The Greenlight Method™ — a proprietary 1–2 session private psychological protocol that removes emotional resistance and self-sabotage blocking high-leverage business actions. Positioned as 'not coaching, not therapy.'
offer.coreOutcome: High-achievers take aligned, unblocked action on previously avoided money-generating activities — with restored self-trust, more energy, and no internal struggle.
offer.commitment: 1–2 private sessions (extra sessions included at no charge if needed) + bonus audio suite + 30-day email accountability support + follow-up result-stabilization audit at day 30. 7-day money-back guarantee.
leadMagnets: Free 15-question online assessment: 'Find Out What's Stopping You'

audience.icp: Established entrepreneurs, executives, coaches, consultants, and senior professionals — people who are educated, capable, and accomplished but stuck in procrastination or avoidance on specific high-leverage or money-generating business actions.
painPoints: Procrastinating on high-stakes actions despite knowing exactly what to do
Emotional resistance and self-sabotage killing momentum
Eroded self-trust from repeated avoidance cycles
Low energy and poor sleep tied to unresolved internal tension
Avoiding visibility, sales conversations, or other business-critical tasks

salesCycle.length: Days to a few weeks (assessment or outreach → demo call application → alignment call → enrollment)
salesCycle.trial: Free 15-question self-assessment + free demo/alignment call (requires application)
salesCycle.closeMechanism: Application-gated alignment call — Nora qualifies and closes prospects personally on the call
salesCycle.topObjection: Price ($2,000 premium; site pre-empts with 'not the cheapest — the most effective') and category skepticism (not traditional coaching or therapy, so buyers need education on the mechanism)

ahaMoment: A measurable drop in emotional charge on a previously avoided high-stakes action during the first private session — felt in the body, not just intellectually understood.

retention.recurring: No subscription; one-time protocol with built-in 30-day email support and a day-30 follow-up audit to stabilize results
retention.expansion: Unknown publicly; protocol guarantee provides additional sessions at no charge if needed — natural upsell/referral surface post-result
retention.churnRisk: Post-program drift if client doesn't implement actions while momentum is high; the 30-day accountability window and audit are the primary guardrails

lifecycleGaps: Welcome & Onboarding: no visible post-enrollment sequence to prime clients before session 1
Lead-Magnet Nurture: assessment completers who don't book a call likely fall into a cold black hole
Trial/Consult Conversion: no-show or non-converting demo call applicants need a follow-up sequence
Value Newsletter: no visible ongoing nurture content for warm audience building
Renewal / Expansion: no referral or alumni re-engagement path visible
Win-Back / Re-Engagement: cold leads and lapsed assessment takers have no re-entry point
toneVoice: Professional and empathetic with earned authority; conversational and direct; Nora shares personal vulnerability (her own self-sabotage story); avoids therapy or coaching clichés; positions the method as a distinct category; results-focused language that speaks to high-achiever identity.
compliance: Not in a regulated healthcare or finance vertical. Standard CAN-SPAM / GDPR applies. Site carries a testimonial disclaimer ('results not typical'). 1% of profits donated to anti-trafficking and homeless-youth charities — worth acknowledging in brand voice but not a compliance constraint.
